name: WooCommerce Shopping Assistant
tagline: Browse products and build a cart on any WooCommerce store, right inside Anna.
description:
Turn Anna into a shopping assistant for any WooCommerce store. Search the catalog by keyword, category, or price range; get full product details; add and remove items from your cart; then review everything before heading to the store checkout - all without leaving the conversation.

Works with the public WooCommerce Store API - only a store URL is required to get started. An optional read-only REST API key unlocks richer catalog data.

No AI provider keys needed. Anna supplies the model; this app supplies the tools.
